rss_feeds.label: Senior / Lead / Principal PM
rss_feeds._search_string: "senior product manager" OR "lead product manager" OR "principal product manager" -intern -contract

rss_feeds.label: Technical / Platform / Staff PM
rss_feeds._search_string: "technical product manager" OR "platform product manager" OR "staff product manager" -intern -contract

rss_feeds.label: API / Integration PM
rss_feeds._search_string: "API product manager" OR "integration product manager" OR "developer product manager" -intern -contract

rss_feeds.label: Director / VP / Head of Product
rss_feeds._search_string: "director of product" OR "VP of product" OR "head of product" -intern -contract

rss_feeds.label: CSM / Senior CSM
rss_feeds._search_string: "customer success manager" OR "senior customer success manager" OR "client success manager" -intern -contract

rss_feeds.label: Technical CSM / TAM
rss_feeds._search_string: "technical customer success manager" OR "technical account manager" -intern -contract

user_profile._comment: Set your title history (most to least senior), years of experience, and preferred domains. These drive the Fit Score calculation.

job_filters._comment: require_us_only drops jobs explicitly located outside the US. onsite_regions lists cities/regions to accept for hybrid/onsite roles — leave empty to accept all locations. allow_remote always accepts remote roles.
